agonist_vs_dual_trigger.label: Dual vs agonist trigger
agonist_vs_dual_trigger.query: ("dual trigger"[tiab] OR "dual triggering"[tiab] OR "GnRH agonist trigger*"[tiab] OR "agonist trigger*"[tiab] OR "kisspeptin trigger*"[tiab]) AND (IVF[tiab] OR ICSI[tiab] OR "ovarian stimulation"[tiab] OR "controlled ovarian stimulation"[tiab] OR "Fertilization in Vitro"[mh] OR "Sperm Injections, Intracytoplasmic"[mh] OR "Ovulation Induction"[mh])

agonist_trigger_suboptimal.label: Suboptimal agonist trigger response
agonist_trigger_suboptimal.query: ("suboptimal*"[tiab] OR "empty follicle*"[tiab] OR "trigger failure*"[tiab] OR "ovulation failure*"[tiab] OR "post-trigger LH"[tiab] OR "LH surge"[tiab] OR "LH rise"[tiab]) AND ("GnRH agonist"[tiab] OR "agonist trigger*"[tiab] OR triptorelin[tiab] OR buserelin[tiab] OR leuprolide[tiab] OR leuprorelin[tiab] OR nafarelin[tiab])

premature_ovulation.label: Premature ovulation
premature_ovulation.query: ("premature ovulation"[tiab] OR "premature LH surge*"[tiab] OR "early ovulation"[tiab] OR "spontaneous ovulation"[tiab] OR "premature luteinization"[tiab] OR "premature luteinisation"[tiab] OR "follicular collapse"[tiab] OR "follicle collapse"[tiab]) AND (IVF[tiab] OR ICSI[tiab] OR "oocyte retrieval"[tiab] OR "egg collection"[tiab] OR "Oocyte Retrieval"[mh] OR "Ovulation Induction"[mh])

lead_follicle_oversize.label: Lead follicle size & trigger timing
lead_follicle_oversize.query: ("lead follicle*"[tiab] OR "follicle size"[tiab] OR "follicular size"[tiab] OR "follicle diameter"[tiab] OR "follicular diameter"[tiab] OR "trigger timing"[tiab] OR "trigger criteria"[tiab] OR "oversized follicle*"[tiab] OR "follicular cohort"[tiab]) AND (oocyte*[tiab] OR matur*[tiab] OR "trigger day"[tiab] OR "Oocytes"[mh] OR "Ovulation Induction"[mh])

zymot_microfluidic.label: ZyMot / microfluidic sperm selection
zymot_microfluidic.query: ("ZyMot"[tiab] OR "ZyMōt"[tiab] OR "microfluidic sperm*"[tiab] OR "Fertile Chip*"[tiab] OR "microfluidic sorting"[tiab] OR "microfluidic selection"[tiab] OR "microchip selection"[tiab] OR (microfluidic*[tiab] AND (sperm*[tiab] OR spermatozoa[tiab])))

sperm_dna_fragmentation.label: Sperm DNA fragmentation (single-strand) & ART
sperm_dna_fragmentation.query: ("DNA fragmentation"[tiab] OR "sperm DNA damage"[tiab] OR "sperm chromatin"[tiab] OR DFI[tiab] OR SCSA[tiab] OR TUNEL[tiab] OR "sperm chromatin structure assay"[tiab] OR "sperm chromatin dispersion"[tiab] OR "DNA Fragmentation"[mh]) AND (IVF[tiab] OR ICSI[tiab] OR ART[tiab] OR "live birth*"[tiab] OR "Fertilization in Vitro"[mh] OR "Sperm Injections, Intracytoplasmic"[mh])

sperm_dna_double_strand.label: Sperm double-strand DNA damage
sperm_dna_double_strand.query: ("double strand*"[tiab] OR "double-strand*"[tiab] OR "γH2AX"[tiab] OR "gamma H2AX"[tiab] OR "gamma-H2AX"[tiab] OR "neutral comet*"[tiab] OR Extensiv[tiab] OR "DBD-FISH"[tiab]) AND (sperm*[tiab] OR "Spermatozoa"[mh])

tese_high_dfi.label: TESE for high DFI
tese_high_dfi.query: (TESE[tiab] OR "testicular sperm extraction"[tiab] OR "testicular sperm aspiration"[tiab] OR TESA[tiab] OR "testicular sperm"[tiab] OR "Sperm Retrieval"[mh]) AND ("DNA fragmentation"[tiab] OR DFI[tiab] OR "high DNA"[tiab] OR oligospermi*[tiab] OR teratozoospermi*[tiab] OR "ejaculated sperm"[tiab])

pgta_advanced_age.label: PGT-A in advanced maternal age
pgta_advanced_age.query: ("PGT-A"[tiab] OR "PGT A"[tiab] OR "preimplantation genetic testing"[tiab] OR "preimplantation genetic screening"[tiab] OR PGS[tiab] OR "aneuploidy screening"[tiab] OR "Preimplantation Diagnosis"[mh]) AND ("advanced maternal age"[tiab] OR AMA[tiab] OR "older women"[tiab] OR "age-related"[tiab] OR "age 38"[tiab] OR "age 39"[tiab] OR "age 40"[tiab] OR "Maternal Age"[mh] OR "euploidy rate*"[tiab] OR "blastocyst aneuploidy"[tiab])

blastocyst_grading_outcomes.label: Blastocyst grading & outcomes
blastocyst_grading_outcomes.query: ("Gardner grad*"[tiab] OR "blastocyst grad*"[tiab] OR "trophectoderm grad*"[tiab] OR "ICM grad*"[tiab] OR "inner cell mass"[tiab] OR "blastocyst morphology"[tiab]) AND ("live birth*"[tiab] OR implantation[tiab] OR euploid*[tiab] OR "Embryo Implantation"[mh] OR "Live Birth"[mh])

antagonist_protocol_normoresponder.label: Antagonist protocol in normo-responders
antagonist_protocol_normoresponder.query: ("antagonist protocol*"[tiab] OR "GnRH antagonist*"[tiab] OR cetrorelix[tiab] OR ganirelix[tiab]) AND ("normal responder*"[tiab] OR "normoresponder*"[tiab] OR "normo-responder*"[tiab] OR "ovarian stimulation"[tiab] OR "Ovulation Induction"[mh])

intercycle_interval.label: Inter-cycle interval
intercycle_interval.query: ("inter-cycle interval"[tiab] OR "intercycle interval"[tiab] OR "consecutive cycles"[tiab] OR "back-to-back"[tiab] OR "cycle interval"[tiab] OR "rest interval"[tiab]) AND (IVF[tiab] OR ICSI[tiab] OR "Fertilization in Vitro"[mh])

methylation_mthfr_art.label: MTHFR / methylation & ART
methylation_mthfr_art.query: (MTHFR[tiab] OR MTRR[tiab] OR MTR[tiab] OR PEMT[tiab] OR methylation[tiab] OR methylat*[tiab] OR folate[tiab] OR folic[tiab] OR methylfolate[tiab] OR "methylenetetrahydrofolate reductase"[tiab] OR "methionine synthase"[tiab] OR C677T[tiab] OR A1298C[tiab] OR A66G[tiab] OR "one-carbon metabolism"[tiab] OR homocystein*[tiab] OR "Methylenetetrahydrofolate Reductase (NADPH2)"[mh] OR "Folic Acid"[mh]) AND (IVF[tiab] OR ICSI[tiab] OR oocyte*[tiab] OR "live birth*"[tiab] OR miscarriage[tiab] OR "Fertilization in Vitro"[mh])

one_pn_embryos.label: 1PN / abnormal fertilisation
one_pn_embryos.query: ("1PN"[tiab] OR "1 PN"[tiab] OR "monopronuclear*"[tiab] OR "mono-pronuclear*"[tiab] OR "single pronucleus"[tiab] OR "abnormal fertilization"[tiab] OR "abnormal fertilisation"[tiab]) AND (ICSI[tiab] OR IVF[tiab] OR blastocyst*[tiab] OR "Sperm Injections, Intracytoplasmic"[mh])

ss31_elamipretide.label: SS-31 / elamipretide & fertility
ss31_elamipretide.query: ("SS-31"[tiab] OR "SS 31"[tiab] OR elamipretide[tiab] OR Bendavia[tiab] OR "MTP-131"[tiab]) AND (oocyte*[tiab] OR sperm*[tiab] OR ovar*[tiab] OR fertili*[tiab] OR embryo*[tiab] OR mitochondri*[tiab] OR aging[tiab] OR ageing[tiab])

rapamycin.label: Rapamycin / sirolimus & fertility
rapamycin.query: (rapamycin[tiab] OR sirolimus[tiab] OR "Sirolimus"[mh] OR "mTOR inhibitor*"[tiab]) AND (oocyte*[tiab] OR ovar*[tiab] OR fertili*[tiab] OR embryo*[tiab] OR "ovarian aging"[tiab] OR "ovarian ageing"[tiab] OR "primordial follicle*"[tiab])

embryo_arrest_d3_blast.label: Embryo arrest & blastulation
embryo_arrest_d3_blast.query: ("embryo arrest"[tiab] OR "embryonic arrest"[tiab] OR "developmental arrest"[tiab] OR "blastocyst formation"[tiab] OR "blastocyst development"[tiab] OR "blastulation rate*"[tiab] OR compaction[tiab] OR morula[tiab] OR "day 3 to day 5"[tiab]) AND (IVF[tiab] OR ICSI[tiab] OR "Fertilization in Vitro"[mh])

antioxidant_culture_media.label: Antioxidant culture media
antioxidant_culture_media.query: (antioxidant*[tiab] OR "acetyl-L-carnitine"[tiab] OR "alpha-lipoic acid"[tiab] OR "N-acetyl cystein*"[tiab] OR NAC[tiab] OR "coenzyme Q10"[tiab] OR CoQ10[tiab] OR melatonin[tiab] OR "Antioxidants"[mh]) AND ("culture medi*"[tiab] OR "embryo cultur*"[tiab] OR "Embryo Culture Techniques"[mh] OR blastocyst*[tiab] OR "embryo development"[tiab])

growth_hormone_adjuvant.label: Growth hormone adjuvant in IVF
growth_hormone_adjuvant.query: ("growth hormone"[tiab] OR somatotropin[tiab] OR "human growth hormone"[tiab] OR HGH[tiab] OR "Human Growth Hormone"[mh] OR somatropin[tiab]) AND (IVF[tiab] OR ICSI[tiab] OR "poor responder*"[tiab] OR "ovarian stimulation"[tiab] OR adjuvant[tiab] OR "PGT-A"[tiab] OR euploid*[tiab] OR oocyte*[tiab])

time_lapse_morphokinetics.label: Time-lapse / morphokinetic embryo selection
time_lapse_morphokinetics.query: ("time-lapse"[tiab] OR "time lapse"[tiab] OR morphokinetic*[tiab] OR EmbryoScope[tiab] OR Eeva[tiab] OR Geri[tiab] OR Primo[tiab] OR "Time-Lapse Imaging"[mh]) AND (embryo*[tiab] OR blastocyst*[tiab] OR "embryo selection"[tiab] OR IVF[tiab] OR ICSI[tiab])

duostim_luteal_phase.label: DuoStim / luteal-phase stimulation
duostim_luteal_phase.query: (DuoStim[tiab] OR "dual stimulation"[tiab] OR "double stimulation"[tiab] OR "luteal phase stimulation"[tiab] OR "luteal-phase stimulation"[tiab] OR "random start"[tiab]) AND (IVF[tiab] OR ICSI[tiab] OR oocyte*[tiab] OR "ovarian stimulation"[tiab] OR "poor responder*"[tiab])

picsi_hyaluronan_binding.label: PICSI / hyaluronan binding sperm selection
picsi_hyaluronan_binding.query: (PICSI[tiab] OR "physiological ICSI"[tiab] OR "hyaluronan binding"[tiab] OR "hyaluronan-binding"[tiab] OR "hyaluronic acid"[tiab] OR HABSelect[tiab]) AND (sperm*[tiab] OR ICSI[tiab] OR "Sperm Injections, Intracytoplasmic"[mh])

imsi_high_mag_morphology.label: IMSI / high-magnification sperm morphology
imsi_high_mag_morphology.query: (IMSI[tiab] OR "intracytoplasmic morphologically selected"[tiab] OR "high magnification"[tiab] OR "high-magnification"[tiab] OR MSOME[tiab] OR "motile sperm organelle morphology"[tiab]) AND (sperm*[tiab] OR ICSI[tiab] OR "Sperm Injections, Intracytoplasmic"[mh])

endometrial_receptivity_era.label: Endometrial receptivity testing (ERA / ER-Map)
endometrial_receptivity_era.query: (ERA[tiab] OR "endometrial receptivity*"[tiab] OR "ER-Map"[tiab] OR ERMap[tiab] OR "window of implantation"[tiab] OR WOI[tiab]) AND (IVF[tiab] OR ICSI[tiab] OR FET[tiab] OR "frozen embryo transfer"[tiab] OR implantation[tiab] OR "Embryo Implantation"[mh])

recurrent_implantation_failure.label: Recurrent implantation failure
recurrent_implantation_failure.query: ("recurrent implantation failure"[tiab] OR RIF[tiab] OR "repeated implantation failure"[tiab] OR "implantation failure"[tiab]) AND (IVF[tiab] OR ICSI[tiab] OR FET[tiab] OR "frozen embryo transfer"[tiab] OR "Embryo Implantation"[mh] OR "Reproductive Techniques, Assisted"[mh])

haploid_embryos_decondensation.label: Haploid embryos & sperm decondensation
haploid_embryos_decondensation.query: (haploid*[tiab] OR "sperm aster*"[tiab] OR "sperm decondensation"[tiab] OR "decondensation failure"[tiab] OR parthenogenetic*[tiab] OR androgenetic*[tiab] OR uniparental*[tiab]) AND (embryo*[tiab] OR oocyte*[tiab] OR ICSI[tiab] OR fertilization[tiab] OR fertilisation[tiab] OR "Sperm Injections, Intracytoplasmic"[mh])

varicocele_embolisation_ivf.label: Varicocele embolisation & IVF
varicocele_embolisation_ivf.query: (varicocele*[tiab] OR "Varicocele"[mh]) AND (embolizat*[tiab] OR embolisat*[tiab] OR varicocelectomy[tiab] OR "varicocele repair"[tiab] OR microsurg*[tiab] OR "Embolization, Therapeutic"[mh]) AND (IVF[tiab] OR ICSI[tiab] OR sperm*[tiab] OR "DNA fragmentation"[tiab] OR fertili*[tiab])

choline_pemt_pregnancy.label: Choline / PEMT & pregnancy
choline_pemt_pregnancy.query: (choline[tiab] OR "Choline"[mh] OR PEMT[tiab] OR "phosphatidylethanolamine N-methyltransferase"[tiab] OR betaine[tiab]) AND (pregnan*[tiab] OR oocyte*[tiab] OR embryo*[tiab] OR IVF[tiab] OR ICSI[tiab] OR fertili*[tiab] OR "neural tube"[tiab])

methylfolate_vs_folic_acid_ivf.label: Methylfolate vs folic acid in IVF
methylfolate_vs_folic_acid_ivf.query: (methylfolate[tiab] OR "5-MTHF"[tiab] OR "L-methylfolate"[tiab] OR "5-methyltetrahydrofolate"[tiab] OR methyltetrahydrofolate[tiab]) AND (MTHFR[tiab] OR IVF[tiab] OR ICSI[tiab] OR "live birth*"[tiab] OR pregnan*[tiab] OR miscarriage[tiab])
